name: seo-article-audit
description: Diagnose why an AIHR article lost organic traffic and whether SEO salvage is viable. Reads the article, checks Outline history, derives keyword candidates, pulls GSC/Ahrefs data, runs factual SERP observation, and recommends strategy before optimization. Bundles serp-analysis (US SERP facts), article-diff-md (red/green diffs), and outline-article-refresh-memory (monthly Outline updates during refresh).

interface.longDescription: Reads an AIHR article, checks prior Outline analysis, pulls Google Search Console and Ahrefs facts, delegates factual SERP observation for primary and secondary keywords, and reports a human-in-the-loop salvage strategy before optimization work begins.
defaultPrompt: Why did this AIHR article decline?
Run SEO analysis for this URL
Save this SEO refresh in Outline
